name: Kimchi
fact: Kimchi is a staple fermented side dish with deep regional variation across Korea.

name: Sushi
fact: Sushi became a distinct Japanese culinary tradition long before its modern global spread.

name: Pizza
fact: Modern pizza is most closely associated with Naples, where it evolved into a signature dish.

name: Tacos
fact: Tacos are a foundational part of Mexican cuisine with countless regional variations.

name: Croissant
fact: The croissant became a French breakfast icon after evolving through European pastry traditions.

name: Doner kebab
fact: Doner kebab traces back to Ottoman-era cooking methods that inspired the vertical spit format.

name: Poutine
fact: Poutine originated in Quebec and became one of Canada's most recognizable comfort foods.

name: Dynamite
fact: Alfred Nobel developed dynamite in Sweden and used its commercial success to fund the Nobel Prizes.

name: Basketball
fact: Basketball was invented in Massachusetts as an indoor winter sport.

name: Three-point seat belt
fact: Volvo engineer Nils Bohlin created the modern three-point seat belt in Sweden.

name: Diesel engine
fact: Rudolf Diesel developed the diesel engine in Germany to improve thermal efficiency.

name: Paper money
fact: Paper money first appeared in China centuries before it became common elsewhere.

name: Barcode
fact: The barcode was developed in the United States to speed up retail checkout and inventory systems.

name: Pacemaker
fact: Modern implantable pacemaker technology has major roots in Swedish engineering and medical innovation.

name: Nokia
fact: Nokia transformed from an industrial company into one of Finland's most famous technology brands.

name: IKEA
fact: IKEA began in Sweden and built a global identity around flat-pack design.

name: LEGO
fact: LEGO was founded in Denmark and its name comes from the Danish phrase meaning to play well.

name: Rolex
fact: Rolex became a hallmark of Swiss watchmaking and precision branding.

name: Adidas
fact: Adidas started in Germany and grew into one of the world's best-known sportswear brands.

name: Spotify
fact: Spotify launched in Sweden and helped define modern streaming music culture.

name: Patagonia
fact: Patagonia started in the United States and became known for durable outdoor gear and brand activism.
